metadata.note: Public dashboard summary data generated from private workbook. Verified impact includes fully deployed OER courses beginning with each course's rollout semester.

costAccessBefore.Context: Students who reported concern about the cost of required course materials
Students who reported not purchasing required materials because of cost

oerOutcomes.Context: Students who rated OER materials as comparable to or better than traditional paid textbooks
Students who answered yes when asked whether they want more courses to use OER or no-cost materials

methodology.Value: Averages are weighted by response count, which means courses with more survey responses count more toward the overall result than courses with only a few responses.
